title: Reincarnation
description: Welcome to the Reincarnation Modpack! Where every death sees you reincarnated as a new origin. The modpack features new mobs, mob interactions, bosses, origins, and mechanics, this modpack is incredibly difficult, yet rewarding.
body:
![Aberrant Winds Banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/oiw9LZl6/images/aa40ad33928d15c50b4abbb97d32c6285262442e.png 'An Official Aberrant Winds Modpack!') # Modpack Info You're a being just like any other, unique in some aspects, but affected nevertheless by a similarity that binds all, death. Each origin has it's own upsides and downsides, some are more powerful than others, but all change the default "human" gameplay to some degree. You could come back as any of: - Werewolf - Deathsworn - Phoenix - Broodmother - Dullahan - Chimaera - Drakonwither - Flea - Goolien - Ignisian - Jellyfish - Lost Draconian - Ninetails - Shadow - And 100+ More! --- The goal of this pack is to have a fun and accessible way of playing a difficult modpack with friends while making every life a unique adventure! This modpack is centered around the Randomized Origins mod, forked from the New Life SMP (Unofficial) Modpack. I was taken by the gameplay that random origins adds and decided to expand upon similar modpacks in the following ways: - Porting to Modrinth. - Adding Sodium and other performance enhancing mods. - Significantly increasing the difficulty. - Adding additional Origins. (And some custom ones!) - Swapping the New Life mod for Randomized Origins, which has extended command options. - Adding additional Quality Of Life mods. (SO many) - Revamping terrain generation with the Terralith mod. - Significantly increasing the difficulty. (No, really) - And More! # About Aberrant Winds Aberrant Winds is a community primarily formed around modded minecraft, we aim to foster a fun and inclusive community which accepts a multitude of playstyles. Join our [discord](https://discord.gg/Yq7n97f) for the official Reincarnation Server. ### Join the [Aberrant Winds Discord](https://discord.gg/Yq7n97f)! # Mod List: ## Content Mods
